instruction: Go up the stairs and take a left. Walk towards the couch and chairs in the sitting area. Walk through the sitting area and stop in front of the first door to the balcony on your left.

The placement rule for "door/doorway" states: "Endpoints named 'door / doorway / entrance' mean stand AT the opening (clearance jumps open right through it), not in the room beyond and not meters in front."

So I need to be AT the opening where the clearance jumps to an open value (looking through the door to the balcony). Currently center clearance is 0.2m (very close).
